testcase.name: compression quality > has at least one PDF fixture
compression quality > compression size report > prints a summary table of all compression results
compression quality > compression size report > 'extract-images/dct-flate-wrapper.pdf' ('default'): 699 B → 854 B (-22.2 %)
compression quality > compression size report > 'extract-images/dct-flate-wrapper.pdf' ('web'): 699 B → 1590 B (-127.5 %)
compression quality > compression size report > 'extract-images/dct-flate-wrapper.pdf' ('archive'): 699 B → 854 B (-22.2 %)
compression quality > compression size report > 'extract-images/dct-plain.pdf' ('default'): 676 B → 829 B (-22.6 %)

compression quality > compression size report > 'extract-images/dct-runlength-wrapper.…' ('archive'): 697 B → 852 B (-22.2 %)

optimizePdf > returns correct size statistics
optimizePdf > includes the preset name in the result
optimizePdf > defaults preset to 'default'
optimizePdf > copies output out of WASM heap via slice()
optimizePdf > wraps WASM failures in QpdfCompressionError
optimizePdf > accepts ArrayBuffer input
linearizePdf > forwards linearize: true to the WASM compressPdf call
linearizePdf > includes preset in the result
Error Classes > QpdfError > should create error with message
Error Classes > QpdfError > should support error cause
Error Classes > QpdfError > should expose structured error metadata
Error Classes > QpdfError > should work with instanceof
Error Classes > QpdfInitError > should create init error
Error Classes > QpdfCompressionError > should create compression error
Error Classes > QpdfSplitError > should create split error
Error Classes > QpdfMergeError > should create merge error
Error Classes > QpdfValidationError > should create validation error
Error Classes > QpdfConversionError > should create conversion error
Error Classes > QpdfOrganizeError > should create organize error
extractImages WASM filter decoding > returns browser-decodable JPEG bytes for 'plain DCTDecode'
extractImages WASM filter decoding > returns browser-decodable JPEG bytes for 'ASCII85-wrapped DCTDecode'

testcase.name: inspectPdf > returns document info
inspectPdf > disposes the document after a successful read
inspectPdf > disposes the document even when info() throws
checkPdf > returns isValid: true and empty warnings on success
checkPdf > returns isValid: false with the error message in warnings when a QpdfError is thrown
checkPdf > returns a zeroed info when the PDF is invalid
checkPdf > rethrows QpdfValidationError unchanged
checkPdf > rethrows non-QpdfError errors unchanged
mergePdfs > throws QpdfMergeError when called with an empty array
mergePdfs > merges a single input and returns data with sourceCount
mergePdfs > reports the correct sourceCount for multiple inputs
mergePdfs > copies output out of WASM heap via slice()
mergePdfs > throws QpdfMergeError when mergePdfs export is missing
mergePdfs > wraps unexpected errors in QpdfMergeError
mergePdfs > accepts ArrayBuffer inputs
organizePdf > throws QpdfOrganizeError when pages is empty
organizePdf > selects a single page from a multi-page PDF
organizePdf > passes pages to mergePdfs in the specified order
organizePdf > allows duplicate page indices
organizePdf > removes pages by omitting their index
organizePdf > accepts ArrayBuffer input
organizePdf > returns the data from mergePdfs
organizePdf > throws QpdfOrganizeError for an out-of-bounds index
organizePdf > throws QpdfOrganizeError for a negative index
organizePdf > throws QpdfOrganizeError for a non-integer index
organizePdf > wraps unexpected errors in QpdfOrganizeError
raw pixel encoder > uses pixelColorModel rather than components to decide support
raw pixel encoder > reports unsupported color spaces for unknown pixel color models
QpdfDocument > QpdfDocument.open() static factory > returns a QpdfDocument instance
QpdfDocument > QpdfDocument.open() static factory > passes password to processMemoryFile
QpdfDocument > QpdfDocument.open() static factory > passes empty string when no password is given
QpdfDocument > instance.open() disposes previous instance > calls delete() on the previous wrapper before replacing it
QpdfDocument > property getters > pageCount delegates to getNumPages()
QpdfDocument > property getters > pdfVersion delegates to getPDFVersion()
QpdfDocument > property getters > isEncrypted delegates to isEncrypted()
QpdfDocument > property getters > isLinearized delegates to isLinearized()
QpdfDocument > property getters > throws QpdfValidationError when the document is not open
QpdfDocument > info() > aggregates all document metadata
QpdfDocument > write() > returns a Uint8Array from writer.getBuffer()
QpdfDocument > write() > calls writer.delete() even when write() throws
QpdfDocument > write() > wraps write failures in QpdfCompressionError
QpdfDocument > write() > calls coalesceContentStreams() when compressPages is true
QpdfDocument > write() > does not call coalesceContentStreams() when compressPages is false
QpdfDocument > write() > calls removeUnreferencedResources() when removeUnreferencedResources is true
QpdfDocument > write() > does not call removeUnreferencedResources() when removeUnreferencedResources is false
QpdfDocument > write() > calls both coalesceContentStreams() and removeUnreferencedResources() for archive preset options
QpdfDocument > write() > calls coalesceContentStreams() before constructing the writer
QpdfDocument > write() > write() called twice with different options does not carry over mutations from the first call
QpdfDocument > write() > inspect-then-write: picks a preset from page count without parsing the PDF twice
QpdfDocument > write() > throws QpdfValidationError when the document is not open
QpdfDocument > dispose() > is idempotent — safe to call multiple times
splitPdf > returns pages and pageCount
splitPdf > copies pages out of WASM heap via slice()
splitPdf > throws QpdfSplitError when splitPages export is missing
splitPdf > wraps unexpected errors in QpdfSplitError
splitPdf > accepts ArrayBuffer input
Format Utilities > formatBytes > should format zero bytes
Format Utilities > formatBytes > should format bytes
Format Utilities > formatBytes > should format kilobytes
Format Utilities > formatBytes > should format megabytes
Format Utilities > formatBytes > should respect decimals parameter
Format Utilities > calculateSavings > should calculate savings correctly
Format Utilities > calculateSavings > should handle no savings
Format Utilities > calculateSavings > should handle size increase
Format Utilities > formatPercentage > should format positive percentages with sign
Format Utilities > formatPercentage > should format negative percentages
Format Utilities > formatPercentage > should format zero
Format Utilities > formatPercentage > should respect decimals parameter
Validation Utilities > normalizeBuffer > should return Uint8Array as-is
Validation Utilities > normalizeBuffer > should convert ArrayBuffer to Uint8Array
Validation Utilities > normalizeBuffer > should throw on invalid input
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should return defaults for undefined options
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should accept valid compression level
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should reject invalid compression level
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should accept valid decode level
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should reject invalid decode level
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should accept valid object streams mode
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should reject invalid object streams mode
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > should coerce boolean values
Validation Utilities > validateOptimizeOptions > applies the web preset
